description_long: This handbag features a modern, color-blocked design with three distinct panels: a muted gray, a bold red, and a mustard yellow, all set beneath a wide, matte black upper section. The bag is constructed from what appears to be a soft, flexible material, likely leather or faux leather, with a slightly matte finish. Two sturdy, flat black handles are attached at the top, allowing for comfortable hand or shoulder carrying. The back of the bag is primarily gray with black accents, and the sides reveal the continuation of the color-blocked pattern. The interior is not visible, but the bag appears spacious and practical for everyday urban use. There are no visible logos, decorative elements, or external pockets, giving it a minimalist and contemporary aesthetic.
description: A color-blocked handbag with black, gray, red, and yellow panels, featuring two flat black handles and a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the color-blocked panels (gray, red, yellow) and both black handles clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the yellow and gray panels, with the bag's depth and handle attachment visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays mostly gray and black panels, with both handles draped and no visible closure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the gray and black panels, emphasizing the bag's width and structure.
attribute_strap_type: Two flat, medium-length black handles suitable for hand or shoulder carry; not adjustable; attached at the top edges.
attribute_closure_mechanism: No visible closure mechanism; the main compartment appears open at the top.
